title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE IROSIN HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF IROSIN, PROVINCE OF SORSOGON, TO GALLANOSA HIGH SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1341 / 55 OG No. 38, 8098 (September 21, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2530, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE IROSIN HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF IROSIN, PROVINCE OF SORSOGON, TO GALLANOSA HIGH SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Irosin High School in the Municipality of Irosin, Province of Sorsogon, is hereby changed to Gallanosa High School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
